channel.title: Prompt-Engineering on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Prompt-Engineering on DevOpsTales

item.title: AI IDE Fundamentals: Agents, Commands, Skills, Rules, Context, and Workflows Explained
item.description: Modern AI-powered IDEs like Kilo Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and GitHub Copilot have introduced a new vocabulary: agents, skills, rules, contexts, and workflows. But what do these terms actually mean, and how do you use them effectively?
